title: nigella sativa var. indica
intro: Nigella sativa var. indica, also known as black cumin, is a variety of the Nigella sativa plant, a flowering plant native to the Middle East and South Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nigella sativa var. indica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of black cumin include oil, capsules, and powder, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
